name: companycam-mcp-server
description: CompanyCam Core API (v2) — 62 tools generated from CompanyCam's OpenAPI definitions.

api_token.title: CompanyCam API Token
api_token.description: From the CompanyCam web app: company settings → API/Access Tokens. Requires a Pro, Premium, or Elite plan.

user_email.title: CompanyCam User Email (optional)
user_email.description: Attributes created records to this CompanyCam user via the X-CompanyCam-User header. Leave blank to omit.
